race.comment: AYE AYE CAPTAIN (3) good type who can race much closer from the inside gate. Snagged back from the wide draw and saved good ground along the inside with a fast finishing third over 1400m at Rosehill. Near her peak for this and has solid top-three claims. SWIFTIE HARRIET (2) has been thereabouts in her two Sydney placings at Rosehill and doesn't have to improve much to win this. Will hold a forward position and figure prominently. HURRY MISS (10) making good progress in Highway grade and can surprise some of her more fancied rivals with the sharp weight drop. Value player.  MISS KIM KAR (11) raced closer to the speed and found little in the straight with a poor eighth over 1400m at Rosehill. Capable on her day and gets every chance fourth-up. SUPER NUI (5) around the money of late and anywhere near her best could trouble these.
